items.summary: 最近刑滿出獄的香港民主派「47人案」被告胡志偉在倫敦希斯羅機場被英國邊境人員扣留，並擬遣返香港，擾攘多時後獲准入境。當局並未說明事情緣由。
items.title: 香港「47人案」前議員胡志偉英國機場險被遣返

items.summary: Designing and developing a new medicine is an expensive, failure-prone scientific challenge. A new drug can take many years to develop, at the cost of a significant investment. And even then, most possible candidates never reach the patient. For biologic medicines, therapies made from engineered…
items.title: How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines

items.summary: On a gray, humid Saturday morning in central Florida, a little under a dozen people gathered outside the Spring Hill Branch Library to protest the construction of a hyperscale data center in their community. There was no immediate threat - the Hernando County commission had unanimously approved a…
items.title: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left

items.summary: Talking to The Economist, Musk said he doesn't care if people hate him and said he was not a racist.
items.title: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount

items.summary: PM says ‘those who try to harm the future of our youth will not be spared’ as scandal spirals into widespread anger Narendra Modi has vowed to set up “fast-track courts” to speed up the punishment of officials accused of leaking examination papers, as the Indian prime minister seeks to quell a…
items.title: ‘Cockroach’ protests: India’s Modi promises to punish officials over exam leaks

items.summary: The woman, who had wanted to end her pregnancy at 36 weeks, gave birth to a baby who doctors later killed.
items.title: South Korea woman acquitted of murdering newborn after hospital delivery

items.summary: 這項「大陸除籍滿十年」的新規定，相比兩岸條例本身明定的「在台設籍滿十年」，更加嚴格。台灣陸委會表示，此舉是要「正本清源」，避免公職人員有雙重身分。中國國台辦則批評，台灣操弄戶籍來打壓陸配。
items.title: 台灣陸配參選資格「設籍滿十年」改「除籍滿十年」意味什麼？

items.summary: 中國電影《澎湖海戰》原定暑期上映卻傳撤檔。一部本想收割「愛國主義」票房的主旋律作品，卻意外觸動了「反清復明」這根埋藏在民間深處的歷史神經。
items.title: 中國電影《澎湖海戰》傳上映遭擱置：「反清復明」民間史觀神經再被挑動

items.summary: 專家表示，這將是美國首次達成此類安排，並可能增加這個本已不穩定地區未來出現核擴散的風險。
items.title: 美國與沙特簽署核協議 為中東再引核擴散風險
